title: Gate delta surfaces issues the round-trip exposes

steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. Goal: confirm that when a direct YAML edit introduces a problem the serializer cares about (a broken reference), the gate delta lists it as a new issue. We start from a clean prefab and break a GUID by hand so the delta is attributable to our edit, not a pre-existing condition.

steps.title: Stage a clean prefab and break a reference GUID
Expected outcomes
items: reserialize itself does not throw on broken refs (mutation.success may be true)
gate.delta.newIssues contains an issue key for the broken asset (e.g. a missing_references|Error|...|MISSING_* entry)
agentNextSteps points to apply_fix when a fix is available for the issue

reset.note: The fixture is disposable; the snapshot restore reverts the GUID patch and the declared delete removes the staged tree. The source demo asset (BrokenRefFixture) is never modified.
